name: Stealing these girlfriends (NETORI)
description:
One day while you are resting at home, your brother calls you, he invites you to come spend 3 months of vacation, in his chalet in the mountains and by a lake. So you accept and he warns you that two of his friends will also come, including one with his little sister

So you agree to come and this is how your mission begins: to steal your brothers' girlfriends. There is Yuri, 21 years old, tall blonde, kind, confident and madly in love with your brother. And then there is also Akiho, your brother's second girlfriend, also 21 years old, cheeky, rather dominant and playful and quite cruel and madly in love with your brother Toru. And finally there is Akiho's little sister, Saeko 18 years old, quite cold except with your brother and rather reserved, she doesn't like you and prefers your brother

So you have two options, steal your brother's girlfriends and little sister or let your brother enjoy the vacation with his girlfriends and find yourself alone and humiliated. Because your brother's goal in inviting you is to humiliate you and show you that he is much better

All characters are 18 years old
